captiClientInfo.message: Click the {icon} CaptiClient info button to see what CaptiClient adds, how it relates to Pybricks, and the license/attribution notes.

home.message: Home brings recent programs, saved programs, and quick creation into one place. Click the {icon} button to create a normal local program.

coop.message: Co-op Rooms let teammates share room programs. Start or join a room, create a room program, then select it like a shared file.

jerryAi.message: Jerry AI can read the current editor code, explain terminal output, and insert generated code when you choose to use it.

newFile.message: Click the {icon} button to create a new program.

backupFiles.action: Click {icon} to back up your programs.

flashPybricksFirmware.message: To use {appName}, you have to install the Pybricks firmware.

restoreOfficialFirmware.message: You can restore the official {lego} firmware at any time.

connectToHub.message: Click the Bluetooth button to connect.

downloadAndRun.message: Once connected, click the {icon} button to run your program.
downloadAndRun.runAgain: The program is now saved on the hub. Press the button on the hub to run it again.
